impacts.title: Generative AI Services Demand: 180% Revenue Growth at Indian IT Leaders
impacts.pitch: We help enterprise buyers of generative AI services select and govern the right Indian IT partner — our AI procurement platform benchmarks GenAI delivery capabilities across Infosys Topaz, TCS AI Cloud, Wipro AI360, and HCL AI Force, ensuring you get measurable business outcomes from your AI investment.

impacts.title: EU AI Act Compliance: $500M Implementation Opportunity for Indian IT
impacts.pitch: We help European enterprises navigate EU AI Act compliance by leveraging Indian IT implementation partners — our compliance framework maps EU AI Act requirements to specific delivery capabilities at TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and HCL, cutting compliance implementation timelines by 40%.

impacts.title: DOGE Federal Tech Cuts: Indian IT Companies Pivot to Private Sector
impacts.pitch: We help Indian IT companies accelerate their private sector pipeline as US federal revenue faces DOGE headwinds — our account intelligence platform identifies private sector enterprise accounts most likely to sign large-scale cloud and AI transformation deals in the next 90 days.

impacts.title: BFSI Cloud Migration Drives $12B Deal Wins for Indian IT FY2026
impacts.pitch: We help BFSI companies evaluating core banking cloud migration to identify the right Indian IT partner — our deal advisory platform benchmarks TCS BaNCS, Infosys Finacle, and HCL Banking capabilities against your specific migration complexity and regulatory constraints.

impacts.title: HCL Technologies €380M Acquisition Expands EU SAP Practice
impacts.pitch: We help European enterprises planning SAP S/4HANA migrations evaluate HCL's expanded EU delivery capability — our SAP partner selection platform benchmarks implementation track records, EU data sovereignty compliance, and post-go-live support capacity.

impacts.title: Wipro AI360: 30,000 Employees Certified, 65% AI Deal Growth
impacts.pitch: We help enterprises evaluate Wipro's AI360 platform against competitors for AI-led transformation programs — our benchmarking service validates AI skill depth, delivery methodology, and outcome measurement frameworks before you commit to a multi-year AI services contract.
